rulings.Case Title: MADELIENE L MITCHELL VS. UAL CORP/UNITED AIRLINES
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON MONDAY, JUNE 26, 2007, LINE 9. DEFENDANT U.A.L. CORP./ UNITED AIRLINES, INC.'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF MUST SEPARATE THE CAUSES OF ACTION FOR BREACH OF CONTRACT FROM THE TORT CAUSES OF ACTION. WITH RESPECT TO THE BREACH OF CONTRACT CAUSES OF ACTION, PLAINTIFF MUST CLARIFY WHAT TERMS WERE BREACHED AND WHETHER THE TERMS WERE WRITTEN, ORAL, IMPLIED OR SOME COMBINATION THEREOF. TO PLEAD A FORM OF EMPLOYMENT DISCRIMINATION, PLAINTIFF MUST PLEAD THAT SHE WAS PERFORMING COMPETENTLY AND THAT SHE SUFFERED ADVERSE ACTION THAT WAS CAUSALLY RELATED TO HER PROTECTED STATUS. THE UNRUH CIVIL RIGHTS ACT DOES NOT APPLY TO EMPLOYMENT CASES AND PLAINTIFF'S CLAIMS BASED ON THAT ACT ARE SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. =(302/PJM/AP)
